plugins.name: aiden-tasks
plugins.description: Create/find/update your AIDEN tasks from Claude via the /aiden-tasks:aiden command + MCP tools (OAuth, no key). Plus /aiden-tasks:aiden-vault to pull a task/project credential from your AIDEN vault and apply it safely (git push, deploy key, env). Optional per-branch session auto-logging (needs a per-user key).
